_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v8: 9088 entries. System prompt aligned to eval. Full v6 data, no reduction. goofspiel 1048, leduc 1069, liars 1829, gin 1026, othello 1358, hex 1211, clobber 1547.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-25: v8. 9088 entries. eval-aligned prompt. 0 errors. HF synced.

NAVWORLD.v6_quality: 2961 entries. <think> on every assistant msg. 0 missing tool_call_id. 0 bad format. 100% audit.
NAVWORLD.notes: V6 FINAL. <think> on every tool_call step + plan (for --reasoning-parser qwen3). Removed 221 broken entries (missing tool_call_id) + 22 weak intercity. Replaced with high-quality data.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-25: V6 final. 0 issues. All think+tool_call_id validated. 7 types balanced.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: 801 canonical. R2 pool 3145. 3 fresh workers running. Continuous sampling.

LIVEWEB.notes: v17b FINAL. 3516 entries. goto:stop=3:1 (was 6.6:1). 100% <think> tag. 0% vague. 100% stop complete. 2/3/4 balanced. HF synced.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-25: v17b. Rebalanced goto:stop from 6.6:1 to 3:1. 20/20 spot-check passed. HF synced.
